# DrawUI.js Component Index

This index documents the maintained public surface of the DrawUI package.
Sections follow the class hierarchy: **Text** and **Inputs** are `Control` leaves; **Layout**, **Collections**, **Panels**, **Overlays**, and **Shell** are `Container` branches; **Peers** need external packages; **Facade** is the package entry surface.

## Import Surfaces

Use package exports for all public DrawUI consumption:

```js
import { DrawUI, FloatingWindow, Button, RadialMenu } from "drawui";
import "drawui/styles/core.css";
```

## Status Legend

- **Stable**: documented, maintained package API.
- **Experimental**: public, but behavior or styling may still evolve.
- **Internal**: repository code that should not be treated as package API.

See also the [API reference](./api/index.html) for per-symbol pages.

## Text

| Component | Status | Import | Emitted class(es) | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `Hyperlink` | Stable | `drawui` | `Link` | Anchor wrapper with optional icon and external-target behavior. |
| `Image` | Stable | `drawui` | `Image` | Image wrapper around `img`. |
| `Svg` | Experimental | `drawui` | `SVG` | Supports fetch, clone, and ID retargeting for reusable SVGs. |
| `Paragraph` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Semantic `p` wrapper. |
| `Heading` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Semantic heading wrapper (`h1`–`h6` via level option). |
| `Span` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Generic inline wrapper. |
| `TextBlock` | Stable | `drawui` | `TextBlock` | Inline text primitive. |
| `Caption` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Thin `small` wrapper. |
| `Title` | Stable | `drawui` | `Title` | Panel-style title text for section headers. |
| `Disclaimer` | Stable | `drawui` | `disclaimer` | Muted helper or legal copy. |
| `Code` | Stable | `drawui` | `Code` | Inline code / API signature chip. |
| `Kbd` | Stable | `drawui` | `kbd` | Keyboard shortcut chip. |
| `Badge` | Stable | `drawui` | `Badge` | Compact status / label badge. |
| `Canvas` | Stable | `drawui` | `Canvas` | HTML canvas wrapper for custom drawing. |
| `Icon` | Stable | `drawui` | `material-symbols-outlined`, `Icon` | Material Symbols icon span. |
| `LineBreak` | Stable | `drawui` | `LineBreak` | Thin `br` wrapper. |
| `Line` | Stable | `drawui` | `Line` | Divider wrapper around `hr`. |
| `Markdown` | Stable | `drawui` | `Markdown` | Markdown (or sanitized HTML) renderer. Min build uses the built-in converter; full build uses Showdown + Highlight.js when those peers are present. |

## Inputs

| Component | Status | Import | Emitted class(es) | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `Label` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Label wrapper for form controls. |
| `Form` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Form wrapper with submit helpers. |
| `ToolbarButton` | Stable | `drawui` | `Button` | Compact button for toolbars and field-control wrappers. |
| `InputText` | Stable | `drawui` | `InputText` | Single-line input with editor-style propagation guards. |
| `InputSearch` | Stable | `drawui` | `InputSearch` | Search input variant of `InputText`. |
| `InputTextArea` | Stable | `drawui` | `InputTextArea` | Multiline editor primitive with tab insertion support. |
| `InputDropdown` | Stable | `drawui` | `InputDropdown` | Native select wrapper. |
| `Checkbox` | Stable | `drawui` | `Checkbox` | Checkbox input primitive. |
| `InputColor` | Stable | `drawui` | `InputColor` | Color input primitive. |
| `InputNumber` | Stable | `drawui` | `InputNumber` | Numeric input with drag and keyboard adjustments. |
| `InputInteger` | Stable | `drawui` | `InputNumber` | Integer-specialized numeric input. |
| `Slider` | Stable | `drawui` | `Slider` | Range track plus numeric field for continuous values. |
| `Button` | Stable | `drawui` | `Button` | Button primitive with optional prepended icon. |
| `IconButton` | Stable | `drawui` | `Button`, `SquareButton`, `SquareButton-label`, `SquareButton-meta`, `Active`, `Button--active` | Tile-style button for icon + label + meta content. |
| `RibbonButton` | Stable | `drawui` | `Button`, `RibbonButton`, `RibbonButton-label`, `Active`, `selected` | Borderless icon+label control with tab-style accent when selected. Use in RibbonBar. |
| `ProgressBar` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Native progress wrapper. |
| `InputDate` | Experimental | `drawui` | `InputDate`, `InputDate-input`, `InputDate-calendar` | Composite date and time picker. |
| `ProgressRing` | Experimental | `drawui` | `spinner-container`, `spinner-wrapper`, `spinner`, `spinner-text`, `spinner-percentage` | Overlay spinner with text and percentage states. |
| `Tooltip` | Experimental | `drawui` | `Tooltip`, `Tooltip--{theme}`, `visible` | Hover tooltip with theme variants. |
| `Operator` | Stable | `drawui` | `Operator` | Icon-only operator control shell. |
| `ThemeToggle` | Stable | `drawui` | `ThemeToggle` | Light/dark theme toggle control. |

## Layout

| Component | Status | Import | Emitted class(es) | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `Control` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Base chainable wrapper around a DOM node. |
| `Container` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Generic block wrapper. |
| `StackPanel` | Stable | `drawui` | `Row`, `Column` | Row/column layout primitive used throughout panel layouts (`new StackPanel({ isVertical: false|true })`). |
| `ScrollViewer` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Scrollable container wrapper. |
| `Grid` | Stable | `drawui` | `Grid` | Grid layout primitive with explicit column or auto-fit helpers. |
| `Rectangle` | Stable | `drawui` | `Rectangle` | Generic panel container. |
| `Card` | Stable | `drawui` | `Card` | Elevated surface shell (`Rectangle` + `Card` class). |
| `Spacer` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Vertical spacer between stacked items. |
| `HSpacer` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Horizontal spacer between inline or row items. |
| `Handle` | Stable | `drawui` | `drag-handle`, `resize-handle` | Drag / resize handle element (`new Handle("drag"|"resize")`). |
| `TabItem` | Stable | `drawui` | `Tab` | Tab chrome created by `TabView.addTab()` — not usually constructed directly. |
| `center` | Stable | `drawui` | `centered` | Adds the shared `centered` class to a control. |
| `TabView` | Stable | `drawui` | `TabView`, `TabView-tabs`, `TabView-content`, `Tab`, `Tab-float`, `selected` | Self-managed tab container. |
| `makeFlexResizer` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Creates a pointer-driven flex size resizer between siblings. |
| `createSplitResizer` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Builds a resizer control for a split-pane child index. |
| `createLayoutResizerHandle` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Creates a left/right/bottom workspace layout resizer handle. |

## Collections

| Component | Status | Import | Emitted class(es) | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `InputList` | Stable | `drawui` | `InputList`, `Active` | Selectable list container. |
| `InputListItem` | Stable | `drawui` | `InputListItem` | Clickable row for `InputList`. |
| `LabeledBoxItem` | Stable | `drawui` | `workspace-menu-item` | Checkbox + icon + label menu row for workspace menus. |
| `NavigationList` | Stable | `drawui` | `dui-drill`, `dui-drill-header`, `dui-drill-item`, `NavigableList` | One-level-at-a-time hierarchical navigation with back control. |
| `TreeView` | Stable | `drawui` | `dui-tree`, `dui-tree-item`, `dui-tree-toggle`, `dui-tree-label`, `dui-tree-children`, `is-expanded`, `is-selected` | Expandable nested tree; same data options shape as `NavigationList`. |
| `SortableList` | Stable | `drawui` | `reorderable-list`, `reorderable-item`, `drag-handle`, `reorderable-placeholder`, `is-dragging`, `InputList`, `InputListItem`, `Checkbox` | Drag-and-drop reorder list with optional checkboxes. |
| `PropertyGrid` | Stable | `drawui` | `PropertyGrid`, `PropertyGrid-row` | Key/value property editor grid. |
| `PropertyGridRow` | Stable | `drawui` | `PropertyGrid-row` | Single row helper for `PropertyGrid`. |

## Panels

| Component | Status | Import | Emitted class(es) | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `ContentPanel` | Stable | `drawui` | `ContentPanel`, `Rectangle`, `Header`, `PanelContent`, `RibbonBar` | Panel scaffold. Use header()/content()/footer() to set regions; add() appends to content. |
| `WorkspacePanel` | Stable | `drawui` | `WorkspacePanel`, `CollapsiblePanel`, `ContentPanel`, `Header`, `PanelContent`, `RibbonBar` | Collapsible ContentPanel mounted as a tab in a WorkspaceRegion (left/right/bottom). |
| `Header` | Stable | `drawui` | `Header` | Shared title/icon/actions row for panel chrome (`ContentPanel`, `CollapsiblePanel`, `WorkspacePanel`). |
| `RibbonBar` | Stable | `drawui` | `RibbonBar` | Horizontal ribbon / action row for panel footers or the app shell. Pair with RibbonButton. |
| `CollapsiblePanel` | Stable | `drawui` | `CollapsiblePanel`, `CollapsiblePanel-toggle`, `ContentPanel`, `Header`, `PanelContent`, `collapsed` | ContentPanel with a header collapse toggle. |
| `InstructionPanel` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Titled panel of keyboard / pointer instruction rows. |
| `InstructionLine` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | One keyboard shortcut row: key chip + description. |
| `Toast` | Stable | `drawui` | `Toast`, `Toast--{type}`, `Toast--fade-out`, `Toast-close`, `status-bar`, `status-bar-fill` | Transient notification (`new Toast(message, type)`) or progress overlay (`toast.show` / `update` / `hide`). |
| `StatusBar` | Stable | `drawui` | `StatusBar` | Application status bar with message regions. |

## Overlays

| Component | Status | Import | Emitted class(es) | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `FloatingDialog` | Stable | `drawui` | `ContentPanel`, `Header`, `PanelContent`, `RibbonBar` | Lightweight floating panel built on `ContentPanel`. |
| `Flyout` | Stable | `drawui` | `Flyout`, `Flyout-header`, `Flyout-icon`, `Flyout-title`, `Flyout-content`, `Flyout-search`, `expanded`, `Badge`, `centered` | Expandable tool panel with optional search row. |
| `FloatingWindow` | Stable | `drawui` | `FloatingWindow`, `FloatingWindow-header`, `FloatingWindow-content`, `circle`, `pos-btn`, `green`, `red`, `Row`, `centered-vertical`, `justify-between`, `fill-width`, `fill-height` | Free-floating window with docking controls. |
| `RadialMenu` | Experimental | `drawui` | None by default | Radial interaction overlay. |
| `makeDraggable` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Attaches drag behavior to a panel via a header handle element. |
| `makeResizable` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Attaches edge resize behavior to a floating panel. |

## Shell

| Component | Status | Import | Emitted class(es) | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `SplitContainer` | Stable | `drawui` | `split-container` | Flex host for horizontal/vertical split panes. |
| `WorkspaceLayout` | Stable | `drawui` | `World`, `workspace-layout`, `WorkspaceStack` | Applies workspace grid, resizers, and stacked CollapsiblePanel / WorkspacePanel roots. Undock transfers content into a FloatingWindow. |
| `buildWorldFromConfig` | Stable | `drawui` | `World` | Build the `#World` DOM tree from declarative config before `WorkspaceLayout.init()`. |
| `createDefaultWorldConfig` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Default workspace shell config with stable region ids for `WorkspaceLayout`. |
| `AppShell` | Stable | `drawui` | `AppShell`, `AppShell-sidebar`, `AppShell-main` | SPA host with sidebar navigation and hash routing. |
| `NavigationView` | Stable | `drawui` | `NavigationView`, `NavigationView-sidebar`, `NavigationView-content` | Sidebar + content navigation scaffold. |
| `buildWorkspaceDockHandlers` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Returns dock/undock handlers for WorkspacePanel chrome wired to a WorkspaceLayout. |

## Peers

| Component | Status | Import | Emitted class(es) | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `Chart` | Stable | `drawui` | `Rectangle`, `chart-ui-component` | Chart.js-backed visualization panel used by `DrawUI.Chart()`. |
| `DataGrid` | Stable | `drawui` | `Rectangle`, `ag-grid-custom` | AG Grid-backed spreadsheet panel used by `DrawUI.Spreadsheet()`. |
| `GanttChart` | Stable | `drawui` | `Rectangle`, `gantt-container` | jsGantt-improved-backed scheduling chart. |
| `NodeGraph` | Stable | `drawui` | `dui-node-graph`, `dui-node`, `dui-node-port` | Interactive node graph editor. |

## Facade

| Component | Status | Import | Emitted class(es) | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `DrawUI` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Main facade for primitives and composed helpers. Emitted classes vary by factory method. |
| `ICONS` | Stable | `drawui` | None by default | Material Symbols icon name constants. |

### DrawUI Factory Additions

- `new Grid()` — Package-owned CSS grid layout primitive.
- `new IconButton(label, options)` — Tile-style action button without module-local styling.

## CSS Entry Points

| File | Status | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `styles/core.css` | Stable | Imports token, reset, primitive, and generic component layers. |
| `styles/tokens.css` | Stable | Package-owned `--dui-*` design tokens. |
| `styles/reset.css` | Stable | Scoped reset helpers. |
| `styles/primitives.css` | Stable | Base primitive classes. |
| `styles/components.css` | Stable | Generic component classes. |
| `styles/icons.css` | Stable | Material Symbols stylesheet for icon-emitting components. |
| `styles/themes/dark.css` | Stable | Dark theme token values. |
| `styles/themes/light.css` | Stable | Light theme token values. |
